commitment_reliability.interpretation: Delivery reliability is high (65/67 primary artifacts on disk). GOVERNANCE reliability is far lower (36/67 carry a clean canonical attestation). The gap between the two is the sprint's core debt.

cycle_time.reason: 28 of 63 completed tasks share bulk-sync placeholder completion timestamps; 13 of the remaining recorded durations are the default 15-minute placeholder. Recorded durations measure a single /exec session, not spec->done cycle time.

wip_aging.aging: Open across the whole sprint window; SESSION_CONTEXT (2026-07-19) records it "started 1mo ago". WIP age >= ~5 weeks — well beyond a 2-week cadence.

throughput.note: Delivery clustered heavily in June 2026 (34 of 49 feature commits) — burst rather than steady flow.

sprint_duration.source: apps/project-tracker/docs/metrics/sprint-18/_summary.json (schedule block); sprint_start/end dates are null in-source.
